resources.string:
NotiFetch needs notification access to capture delivery partner notifications from apps like Swiggy, Zomato, Amazon Flex, and more.

This permission allows NotiFetch to read notifications from delivery apps only. Your personal messages and other app notifications are completely ignored.

Tap the button below to enable notification access in Android Settings.
Notification access is enabled! NotiFetch is now monitoring delivery partner apps for notifications.\n\nYou can close this screen and start using the app.
Notifications from delivery apps will appear here when they arrive
Shows when NotiFetch captures a delivery notification
Swiggy Partner, Swiggy Delivery, Zomato Delivery, Amazon Flex, Dunzo, Porter, Zepto Rider, Blinkit Rider, Uber Eats Partner, Ola Partner, Gojek Driver, Rapido Driver
NotiFetch captures delivery notifications from your delivery partner apps and shows them in one unified dashboard. No login credentials needed, no API access, zero risk.
Your privacy is protected. Only delivery app notifications are captured. Personal messages and other app notifications are completely ignored.
